summary: The provided skill definition for 'a11y-audit' is safe from the security risks outlined. The code primarily involves Python scripts that perform accessibility audits on web applications, focusing on WCAG compliance without any indications of shell command execution, network access, file system writes outside the working directory, prompt injection patterns, data exfiltration risks, credential access, or privilege escalation. All operations are contained within the context of scanning and reporting on codebases for accessibility issues.
